qa_pair.question: Show me the last failed pipelines on master in our project.
How healthy is the nightly schedule on master over the past 7 and 30 days?
Pipeline 12345 is still running — check its current status.
Which specific job failed in pipeline 12345?
Show me the last 200 lines of the log for job 98765.
Which tool should you call to kick off a new pipeline on master with DEBUG=1?
Which tool should you call to retry the failed jobs in pipeline 12345?
Which tool should you call to cancel pipeline 12345 because it is stuck?
What CI/CD schedules are configured and are they all active?
Which tool should you call to delete the broken schedule with ID 42?
Which tool should you call to add a new schedule that runs the build every night at 02:00 Europe/Berlin?
List every open merge request in the project.
Show me the description and branches of merge request !42.
What files did merge request !42 change, with diffs?
Which tool should you call to open a merge request from feature/login into master with title "feat: login"?
Which tool should you call to merge MR !42 into master?
Show me the contents of .gitlab-ci.yml on master.
List all files under src/ on the release-1.2 branch.
What commits are on release/1.5 that aren't on master?
Give me the project ID, visibility, and default branch of this repo.
Show me branches that have "release" in their name.
What was the most recently shipped version tag?
The last pipeline on master failed — which specific job broke and what's the last 50 lines of its log?
Open MR !42 — summarise what changed and show me the .gitlab-ci.yml from its source branch.
What's in the latest release tag's .gitlab-ci.yml?
Grep job 98765's log for any Traceback and give me 5 lines of context around each hit.
Find every Traceback in the failing job of the latest master pipeline.
Is master healthy over 7 days, and if not, which pipeline's failed job's log should I look at?
What commits are on release/1.5 that master doesn't have, and which of them changed .gitlab-ci.yml?
